title: GitLab (NASDAQ:GTLB) Exceeds Q4 CY2025 Expectations
text: GitLab reported strong Q4 CY2025 earnings results. Revenue reached $260.4 million, surpassing analyst estimates of $251.9 million by 3.4% with 23.2% year on year growth. Adjusted EPS was $0.30 versus estimates of $0.23, representing a 30% beat. Operating income reached $53.39 million with a 20.5% margin, beating estimates by 37.6%. The company provided Q1 CY2026 guidance of $254 million in revenue, falling slightly short of analyst expectations at $256 million. Full-year 2027 EPS guidance was set at $0.78 midpoint, missing analyst estimates by 24%. Free cash flow margin improved to 16% from 11.1% in the previous quarter. The stock traded down 3.5% to $25.67 immediately following the results. The company demonstrated strong operational execution this quarter but offered conservative forward guidance, particularly concerning its full-year earnings outlook.
